zh.lifeSummary: 當Lura Ann Bray於1864年5月17日出生在美國喬治亞時，她的父親Littleberry "L.B." Bray37歲，母親Rachel Robinson29歲。她於1883年8月26日與Harrison Riley Massey在美國喬治亞哈特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她於1900年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林安賀且於1910年住在美國阿肯色州加蘭安賀 堂史普。她去世於1920年2月29日在美國阿肯色州加蘭霍特 斯普林斯享年55歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州加蘭霍特 斯普林斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lura Ann Bray于1864年5月17日出生在美国乔治亚州时，她的父亲Littleberry "L.B." Bray37岁，母亲Rachel Robinson29岁。她于1883年8月26日与Harrison Riley Massey在美国乔治亚州哈特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她于1900年住在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林安賀且于1910年住在美国阿肯色州加蘭安賀 堂史普。她去世于1920年2月29日在美国阿肯色州加蘭霍特 斯普林斯享年55岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州加蘭霍特 斯普林斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Berkshire and Devon. The former is probably named with Old French bray ‘marsh’, the latter from the Cornish element bre ‘hill’.
English: perhaps a topographic name from northern Middle English bra ‘steep (river) bank’ or ‘brow of a hill’, denoting someone who lived at such a place.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy or Picardy called Bray (Eure, Calvados, Aisne, Somme); see 6.

variants.name: Dubray
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone from any of various minor places called Bray (see Bray ).
Altered form of French   Dubreuil  . This surname is common among Native Americans, namely the Cheyenne River Sioux in SD.

variants.name: Braye
meanings: English (Sussex): from the Middle English female personal name Braye. Its origin is unknown but it might derive from Breton bregh ‘fine, brave’.

variants.name: Brais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Aldea, Andre, Cecile, Fernande, Stephane.

nameMeanings.name: Lura
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: short form of   Larissa  , introduced in the early 20th century to the English-speaking world. It enjoyed some popularity as the name of one of the principal characters in  Boris Pasternak's  novel Dr Zhivago (  1957 ), which was made into a film in  1965 , but it was not until almost forty years later that the name acquired widespread currency in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.description: Abraham Lincoln is assassinated by John Wilkes Booth.
Historical Boundaries 1873: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States;  1873: Garland, Arkansas, United States

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.

historicEvents.title: The Mosaic Templar is Founded
historicEvents.description: The Mosaic Templar is an African American fraternal organization founded in Little Rock. it was founded by former slaves, John Edward Bush and Chester W. Keatts. It was part of a movement that was going on at the time, where everyone was forming fraternities and sororities. The main departments for this one where endowment, monument, analysis, uniform, rank, recapitulation, records, and a juvenile division.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Encyclopedia of Arkansas History & Culture- Mosaic Templars of America

historicEvents.title: The Last Public Hanging in Georgia
historicEvents.description: The last public hanging in Georgia was on September 28, 1893. The General Assembly prohibited public executions in December 1893. Prior to this law, Georgians commonly traveled to witness scheduled public executions.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

historicEvents.title: Not for profit elections
historicEvents.description: The first act prohibiting monetary contributions to political campaigns by major corporations.

historicEvents.title: The Bureau of Investigation is formed
historicEvents.description: Known as the National Bureau of Criminal Identification, The Bureau of Investigation helped agencies across the country identify different criminals. President Roosevelt instructed that there be an autonomous investigative service that would report only to the Attorney General.

en.lifeSummary: When Lura Ann Bray was born on 17 May 1864, in Georgia, United States, her father, Littleberry "L.B." Bray, was 37 and her mother, Rachel Robinson, was 29. She married Harrison Riley Massey on 26 August 1883, in Hart, Georgia, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She lived in Antioch, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1900 and Antioch Township, Garland, Arkansas, United States in 1910. She died on 29 February 1920, in Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 55, and was buried in Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lura Ann Bray est née le 17 mai 1864, à Géorgie, États-Unis, son père, Littleberry "L.B." Bray, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Rachel Robinson, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Harrison Riley Massey le 26 août 1883, à Hart, Géorgie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle a vécu à Antioch, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1900 et à Antioch Township, Garland, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1910. Elle est décédée le 29 février 1920, à Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lura Ann Bray am 17. Mai 1864 in Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Littleberry "L.B." Bray 37 und ihre Mutter Rachel Robinson 29. Sie hat am 26. August 1883 in Hart, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten Harrison Riley Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1900 hat sie in Antioch, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und 1910 in Antioch Township, Garland, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 29. Februar 1920 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lura Ann Bray è nata il il 17 maggio 1864 nel Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Littleberry "L.B." Bray, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Rachel Robinson, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Harrison Riley Massey il 26 agosto 1883, nel Hart, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Antioch, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1900 e nel Antioch Township, Garland, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1910. Morì il 29 febbraio 1920, nel Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lura Ann Brayが1864年5月17日にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州で生まれた時，父Littleberry "L.B." Brayは37歳，母Rachel Robinsonは29歳であった。1883年8月26日にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ハートでHarrison Riley Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1900年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングアンティオチに，1910年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ガーランドアンティオチ トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼女は1920年2月29日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ガーランドホート スプリングズで55歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ガーランドホート スプリングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lura Ann Bray(이)가 1864년 5월 17일 미국 조지아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Littleberry "L.B." Bray(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rachel Robinson(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1883년 8월 26일 미국 조지아 주 하트에서 Harrison Riley Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1900년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스플링 앤티오치에서, 1910년도에 미국 아칸소 주 가랜드 앤티오치 타운시프에서 살았다. 그녀는 1920년 2월 29일 미국 아칸소 주 가랜드 호트 스플링스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 가랜드 호트 스플링스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lura Ann Bray nasceu em 17 de maio de 1864, em Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Littleberry "L.B." Bray, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Rachel Robinson, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Harrison Riley Massey em 26 de agosto de 1883, em Hart, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela viveu em Antioch, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1900 e em Antioch Township, Garland, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1910. Ela faleceu em 29 de fevereiro de 1920, em Hot Springs, Garland, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Hot Springs, Garland, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lura Ann Bray родилась 17 мая 1864 г. в местности Джорджия, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Littleberry "L.B." Bray было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Rachel Robinson, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Harrison Riley Massey 26 августа 1883 г. в местности харт, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она жила в местности антиоч, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1900 году и в местности антиоч тоуншип, гарланд, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1910 году. Она умерла 29 февраля 1920 г. в местности хот спрингс, гарланд, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности хот спрингс, гарланд, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lura Ann Bray nació el 17 de mayo de 1864, en Georgia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Littleberry "L.B." Bray, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Rachel Robinson, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Harrison Riley Massey el 26 de agosto de 1883, en Hart, Georgia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Vivió en Antioch, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1900 y en Antioch Township, Garland, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1910. Murió el 29 de febrero de 1920, en Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
